name: 情绪调节
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 健康与福祉 / Health & Wellbeing / Health & Wellbeing
curriculum_points: Students in Lower Primary will be able to identify and name a range of feelings in themselves and others, and demonstrate simple strategies (e.g., breathing, quiet time) to manage them.
Students will be able to reflect on the causes and effects of their emotions and develop a personal toolkit of positive coping strategies to promote their mental well-being.
